MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Aug-28-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ALLIED UNIVERSAL MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

Defendant Allied Universal's motion to compel arbitration is granted. All three causes of action filed by plaintiff Kesemane Togia must be arbitrated. This case is stayed until the completion of the arbitration. No opposition filed. Order is signed. (see scanned order for details) Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR#6576, rhunter@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/HK)
